sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n65319" key="mayilo/gos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μαψῐ-λόγος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n65319.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">idly talking</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μ. οἰωνοί</foreign> birds <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">whose cries convey no sure omen,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">h.Merc.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">546</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
